base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of encounter_swirls — a effect_layer from 1994 earthbound. Battle-transition psychedelic-swirl backgrounds — each region has unique swirl. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Battle-transition psychedelic-swirl backgrounds — each region has unique swirl
